One notable return during this event is Anker’s SOLIX F3000 Portable Power Station with an expansion battery at $1,999 shipped, beating out its current Amazon pricing by $301. You may spy a $4,498 MSRP tag on this bundle here, but it’s more often only climbed up to $2,652 since December, with most discounts in the time since having landed it between $2,199 and $1,999, except for a lone flash sale back in late February that dropped it to this same rate. Now, only through the weekend, you’re getting another shot at this expanded unit with $653 savings off the going rate ($2,499 off the MSRP) for the all-time lowest price we have tracked. If you’re only looking to pick up the power station by itself, you can do so at $1,399 shipped with these power deals, which comes in $1 lower than its Amazon listing.
